description.ko: 자연적 침식, 광물 적층, 그리고 지질학적 형성의 가공되지 않은 구조적 미학을 보여주는 지구의 거친 표면을 상세하게 담아낸 시네마틱 영상입니다.
description.en: A detailed cinematic capture of the Earth's rugged skin, showcasing the complex beauty of natural erosion, mineral layering, and the raw structural integrity of geological formations.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of dry, cracked earth texture, intricate vein-like fissures, layered sediment with rich mineral deposits in ochre, burnt sienna, and deep charcoal tones, cinematic side lighting to emphasize depth and relief, 8k resolution, organic planetary surface detail.
